resources.string: Do you really want to authorize this device?
Join our community to discuss features and get help
Stay updated with the latest news and announcements
Support the development and help us keep the project alive
MonoGram is an unofficial Telegram client built with Material Design 3
Tap to check for new version
New version is available for download
You are using the latest version
Please confirm your country code and enter your phone number.
We\'ve sent the code to the Telegram app on your other device.
We\'ve sent the code via SMS.
We\'re calling you with the code.
Your account is protected with an additional password.
Are you sure you want to delete this message?
Are you sure you want to delete these messages?
Your report is anonymous. We will review the chat history to ensure safety.
Pretending to be someone else or a bot
Promoting the sale or use of prohibited substances
Sharing private contact info or addresses
Content not relevant to this specific place
Something else that violates our terms
This photo is only visible to you
Review and accept bot\'s terms of service
Did not add you to contacts
You can publish stories from your profile
Sending voice and video notes is restricted
Members can send one message every %1$s
By launching this Mini App, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. The bot will be able to access your basic profile information.
MonoGram is a free and open-source project. Your support helps us to keep it alive and develop new features.
The sponsor badge with a heart is available from Advanced support level or an equivalent contribution of 150 RUB (about $1.96).
Hold to show, click to copy
Change your name, bio, and profile photo
Open Telegram links to open them in-app
Manage sticker sets and emoji packs
This user supports the project and helps us keep improving it
Fetch sponsor IDs from channel now
Any details such as age, occupation or city. Example: 23 y.o. designer from San Francisco.
You can choose a username on Telegram. If you do, people will be able to find you by this username and contact you without needing your phone number.
As a Premium user, you can add your link a channel, and set business details to your profile
Use fingerprint or face to unlock
Display sensitive media in public channels on all your devices.
Permanently delete your account and all data
Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
Choose how proxy works for each network type
Always connect directly on this network
Pick the fastest available proxy on this network
Reuse the last proxy used on this network
Always use a chosen proxy on this network
Choose how your proxy list is ordered
Show only proxies that are available or unchecked
This will remove all currently offline proxies. Continue?
This will remove all configured proxies from the app. Continue?
Are you sure you want to delete the proxy %1$s?
Keep the app running in the background for reliable notifications
Hide the service notification after it starts. May lead to service termination by system
Undo all custom notification settings for all your contacts and groups
Switch to dark theme when screen brightness is below this level.
Use system colors for the app theme
Swipe to control volume and brightness
Double tap on video edges to seek
Pinch to zoom in video player
Keep archived chats at the top of the list
Keep pinned archive visible even when scrolling
Display previews for links in messages
Swipe from left edge to go back
Display profile photos in the chat list
This will delete the downloaded emoji pack from your device. You can download it again later.
Autoplay GIFs in chat list and chats
Reduces background activity and animations to save battery
Aggressively limit background work and release wake locks
Keep CPU awake for background tasks. Disable to save battery
Disable animations in chat to save battery
Disabling this will reduce power usage but may delay background notifications
Create your own sticker sets using @Stickers bot
Create your own emoji packs using @Stickers bot
Keep track of how much data you use. Disabling can reduce disk space usage.
Network usage tracking is currently turned off. Enable it using the switch above to see how much data you\'re using on mobile, Wi-Fi, and roaming networks.
Includes photos, videos, documents, stickers, and GIFs from all chats.
Are you sure you want to clear cache for \"%1$s\"? This will free up %2$s.
This will remove all cached media files from all chats. Are you sure?
Who can see my last seen time?
Who can see my profile photos?
Who can add a link to my account when forwarding my messages?
Who can add me to groups and channels?
Who can see my phone number?
Who can find me by my number?
Users who add your number to their contacts will see it on Telegram only if they are allowed to by the setting above.
Blocked users will not be able to contact you and will not see your Last Seen time.
Your app is currently protected with a passcode. Enter a new one to change it.
Enter a 4-digit passcode to lock the app and protect your privacy.
Enter your current passcode before changing or turning it off.
Import common ad keywords from assets
Remove all keywords from the list
Tap the + button to add keywords for filtering
Enter keywords separated by commas or new lines to filter channel posts.
Posts from these channels won\'t be filtered
last seen a long time ago
Channels are a tool for broadcasting your messages to unlimited audiences.
You can provide an optional description for your channel. Any person can join your channel if they have a link.
Provide a name and an optional photo for your new group.
Are you sure you want to remove %1$s from your contacts?
Automatically delete new messages sent in this group after a certain period of time.
To provide the best experience, MonoGram needs the following permissions.
Manage device states for better user experience
Take photos and record video messages
Share your location and see nearby users
Select a command to send to the bot
I\'m not short, I\'m just concentrated awesome! 🍫 Also, I\'ve decided to become a professional sleeper 😴
Don\'t forget about the homework! It\'s due tomorrow morning and it\'s quite difficult.
I\'m not short, I\'m just concentrated awesome! 🍫\nAlso, I\'ve decided to become a professional sleeper 😴
That\'s what you say every time you can\'t reach the top shelf... 🙄\nCheck this out: this
Stop exposing me! 😤✨\nI\'ll just use my secret weapon: 💯 pure laziness
Only selected photos and videos are visible.
Grant access to photos and videos to attach files in chat.
Select text to apply rich formatting like in Telegram
Too many AI requests. Telegram Premium may be required.
Notification about app running in background
Select a tool to start editing
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
The connection to this site is encrypted and secure.
The connection to this site is not secure. You should not enter any sensitive information (such as passwords or credit cards) because it could be stolen by attackers.
This account is using an unofficial Telegram client
This title will be visible to all members in the chat
What can members of this group do?
Create folders for different groups of chats and quickly switch between them.
Tap the + button to create one
Up to %1$d channels, %2$d chat folders, %3$d pins, %4$d public links and more.
Read the transcript of any voice message by tapping the button next to it.
No more limits on the speed with which media and documents are downloaded.
Translate entire chats in real time with a single tap.
Include animated emojis from hundreds of packs in your messages.
Tools to set default folder, auto-archive and hide new chats from non-contacts.
Public channels sometimes show ads, but they will no longer appear for you.
React with thousands of emojis — using up to 3 per message.
A special badge next to your name showing that you subscribe to Telegram Premium.
Choose from thousands of emojis to show next to your name.
Choose from a selection of Telegram app icons for your home screen.
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close?
Allow %1$s to access your phone number?
Allow this bot to access your location?
By launching this Mini App, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. The bot will be able to access your basic profile information.
Copy your Monogram profile link to clipboard
Choose which palette you are editing. The editor opens on the palette currently active in the app.
Choose exactly one source for your app colors. Custom uses your editable palettes, Monet uses Android dynamic color. AMOLED only affects dark backgrounds.
Use your own Light/Dark palettes, accents, presets, and manual role colors.
Use system-generated Material You colors based on wallpaper (Android 12+).
Force pure black for dark surfaces to reduce glow and save power on OLED screens.
Each preset has ready Light and Dark variants. Tap Light, Dark, or Both to apply instantly.
Balanced blue with clear readability and neutral surfaces.
Natural greens with calm contrast and soft container tones.
Cool cyan-blue gradient feeling with fresh light and deep dark mode.
Warm orange and coral accent set with high foreground clarity.
Neutral grayscale base with blue-gray accents and strong structure.
Fresh mint and teal combination with gentle containers.
Deep red accent with neutral containers for strong action focus.
Muted violet-gray scheme with controlled saturation and clean contrast.
Beige and amber palette tuned for very soft visual noise.
Icy blue-white feel with high legibility and crisp boundaries.
Vibrant green palette with clean surfaces and modern contrast.
Warm copper-orange theme that keeps text clear in both modes.
Soft pink-magenta tones with gentle containers and strong highlights.
Cool northern blues with a calm, professional visual balance.
Camera and microphone permissions are required
Are you sure you want to clear chat history? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to leave this chat?
Are you sure you want to delete this channel? All messages and media will be lost.
Are you sure you want to delete this group? All messages and media will be lost.
Are you sure you want to delete the selected chats?
Are you sure you want to block this user? This user will not be able to send you messages.
Are you sure you want to unblock this user? They will be able to send you messages again.
Are you sure you want to unpin this message?
Are you sure you want to clear recent stickers?
Are you sure you want to clear recent emojis?
